Don’t forget to enter promo code 8O3OICC2 during checkout to see the discounted price. This is regularly a $60 charging unit, which you can score with a 50% discount using the promo code. It dropped to the $38 mark last year during the holiday sale, but today’s deal knocks it further down with an additional $8 off. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this charger, and it delivers some serious value compared to similar display-equipped models out there from the likes of Anker. Head below for more details.
